entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A C4 cereal crop grown globally in arid and semi-arid climatic conditions.

entities.name: ARID AND SEMI-ARID CLIMATIC CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions where sorghum is grown.

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Major cause for loss of productivity worldwide in crops like sorghum.

entities.name: DELAYED SENESCENCE
entities.description: A plant characteristic that leads to adaptation to drought stress.

entities.name: STAY-GREEN
entities.description: A trait associated with delayed senescence and high yields under drought stress.

entities.name: HIGH YIELDS
entities.description: The result of stay-green adaptation in plants.

entities.name: FINE MAPPING
entities.description: An approach used to identify and dissect genomic regions associated with specific traits.

entities.name: INTROGRESSION LINE CROSS
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop a population for fine mapping.

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeats used to identify double recombinants.

entities.name: SBI-10L
entities.description: The long arm of sorghum chromosome 10.

entities.name: GBS
entities.description: Genotyping-by-sequencing used to increase marker density.

entities.name: XGAP001
entities.description: A flanking marker for stay-green QTLs on SBI-10L.

entities.name: XTXP141
entities.description: A flanking marker for stay-green QTLs on SBI-10L.

entities.name: STAY-GREEN QTLS
entities.description: Quantitative Trait Loci associated with the stay-green trait on SBI-10L.

entities.name: GBS SNPS
entities.description: Single Nucleotide Polymorphisms identified via GBS used for linkage mapping.

entities.name: LINKAGE MAP
entities.description: A map developed using GBS SNPs to identify genomic regions.

entities.name: PER CENT GREEN LEAF AREA (%GLA)
entities.description: A trait used for fine mapping to identify stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G025053
entities.description: AP2/ERF transcription factor family gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G025310
entities.description: Ankyrin-repeat protein gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G025320
entities.description: WD40 repeat protein gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G025283
entities.description: NBSLRR Protein gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G030150
entities.description: Calcium dependant protein kinase gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G029570
entities.description: LEA2 protein gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G024920
entities.description: Putative uncharacterized protein gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: SB10G030520
entities.description: Senescence associated protein gene identified in stay-green QTLs.

entities.name: GWAS MTAS
entities.description: Genome-wide association study meta-trait analyses co-localized with stay-green genomic regions.

entities.name: CLONING
entities.description: A process to isolate and study candidate genes.

entities.name: EXPRESSION LEVEL STUDIES
entities.description: Studies to analyze the expression of candidate genes.

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANT GENOTYPES
entities.description: Genotypes developed to withstand drought stress.
